steps.title: Connect campaign and sales
steps.content: The example after the dash explains the blank: a well-executed marketing campaign helped a novel become a bestseller. The blank should name the public attention and promotion that a marketing campaign creates.

steps.title: Discard unrelated qualities
steps.content: Choice A names creativity, not promotion. Choice C names intricacy, which a marketing campaign does not produce. Choice D names usefulness, which is unrelated to the sales example. The remaining choice names public attention generated by marketing. The answer is B.
